commit.message:
fix: Lighthouse Accessibility — form labels, map marker, social aria-labels

ReservationSection: all 7 inputs/selects get explicit id + htmlFor pairing
(res-name, res-phone, res-email, res-date, res-time, res-guests, res-message).
LeafletMap: sets aria-label + role=img on .leaflet-marker-icon after init.
ContactSection: aria-label on Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp social links.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: auto-recovery uses bash (not sh) and start-shelly.sh for reliable restart

Root causes of failed auto-recovery:
1. RunCommandService used /usr/bin/sh which doesn't support /dev/tcp
   (bashism) — port checks silently failed
2. Complex inline command was fragile — pkill could kill the sh process
3. isAutoRecovering guard used stale React state closure, allowing
   double-triggering or preventing re-entry

Fixes:
- RunCommandService now uses /usr/bin/bash
- Auto-recovery delegates to start-shelly.sh (battle-tested script)
  then unconditionally starts pty-helpers
- Initial poll wait increased to 5s (start-shelly.sh needs ~3s)
- isAutoRecoveringRef prevents stale closure issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: en-truss-design-matlab — posudek příhradového vazníku dle EN 1993-1-1

Nový modul pro návrh a posudek ocelového příhradového vazníku průmyslové
haly dle EN 1993-1-1 (tah, tlak, vzpěr CHS prutů).

Zdroje:
- FEM: fem-2d-truss-matlab/src/linearSolverFn (2D příhrada, axiální síly)
- Vzpěrné délky: Jandera OK-01, Tab. 1.29 (trubkový vazník)
- Kombinace: EN 1990 (2 KZS: G+S, Gmin+W)
- Průřez: EN 1993-1-1 Cl. 6.2.3 (tah) + Cl. 6.3.1 (vzpěr)

Soubory src/:
- trussHallInputFn      — generátor geometrie Pratt/Howe/Warren, sedlo/rovný/pultový
- loadCombinationsFn    — 2 kombinace zatížení (EN 1990)
- memberClassificationFn — klasifikace prutů; direction-independent úhel,
                           sections-based klasifikace pro nepravidelné příhrady
- bucklingLengthsFn     — vzpěrné délky L_cr v rovině / z roviny
- sectionCheckFn        — N_pl,Rd, λ̄, χ, N_b,Rd, třída průřezu CHS
- designCheckFn         — orchestrátor (FEM → klasifikace → posudek → obálka)
- reportFn              — HTML report (UTF-8, MathJax, barevné kódování využití,
                          dynamická tabulka vzpěrných délek, topology/shape podpora)

Příklady:
- example_truss_hall_30m  — sedlový Pratt vazník 30 m (dle Jandera kap. 1.4)
- example_truss_LLENTAB   — vazník LLENTAB 23.26 m (geometrie z Excel exportu)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Pelvis rotation + marker matching + DOF limits overhaul

Major improvements to addb2skel pipeline (MPJPE: 106mm → 24mm mean):

Pelvis Rotation Fix:
- Disable Phase A (direction-first): caused pelvis to escape to wrong
  local minima due to bone_dir loss being ±180° symmetric
- Adaptive pelvis limit: constrain pelvis_rot to q_ref median ± 90°
- Four-pass probe expanded to 0°/90°/180°/270°

Marker Matching:
- T3 position fallback permanently disabled (caused wrong matches)
- T1 redirect: PiG LTOE (2nd MT head) → BSM LTOS (BSM LTOE = toe tip)
- Medial ankle fix: LTAM/LANKMED/L_ANK_MED → LAKI (not LTIC, which is
  80mm above ankle at lower shin)
- Removed wrong aliases: TRUNK_XYPH/T8/T12/ABDL→LUMB (100-281mm error),
  L_HIP_GRTR→LFWT (128mm), metatarsal base→head (50-60mm)
- Added verified aliases for Fregly2012 (19), Tiziana2019 (14),
  vanderZee2022 (14), Hammer2013 (8), Moore2015 (8)
- All aliases verified against original papers

DOF Limits:
- PR#38 scapula fixes: elevation [-0.5, 0.6981], upward_rot [-0.5236, 1.0472]
- PR#38 wrist/lumbar fixes applied
- Scapula DOF limits restored from SKEL original (previously expanded)

Loss Cleanup:
- Disabled: bone_dir (PROXY in pairs), humerus_align (no DIRECT mapping),
  chirality, cartesian vel/accel, scapulohumeral coupling, marker direction
- Enabled: marker loss (was accidentally off), spine_reg increased to 0.3
- Shoulder width weight reduced to 2.0

Code:
- gender → sex terminology throughout (skel_interface, pipeline, config)
- Auto sex detection from B3D metadata or height/mass estimation
  (CDC NHANES 2015-2018, Fryar et al. NCHS Report No. 122)
- Child filtering (age > 0 and age < 18)

commit.message:
Inject mid-session reminder when return greeting detected after prior content

System prompt instruction alone was insufficient — 'hello again' triggered
a generic greeting override regardless. Now detects short greeting after
2+ session turns and injects a role=system reminder directly before the
user message, telling DeepSeek to check the history and honour any
unfinished story or forward anchor.

commit.message:
Add story loop rule + fix 7C return-greeting with unfinished story

When senior returns mid-session with 'hello again' after Saathi made
a forward-anchor, Saathi must reference the thread — not give a generic
greeting. 'Good evening. How has the day been?' after 'I'll be here
if you want to continue' is a broken promise.

Added STORY LOOP purpose loop with trigger patterns and examples.
Tightened Rule 7C with explicit broken-promise framing.

commit.message:
Add resolution tracker, cross-platform prices, and correlation detector

1. Resolution Tracker: SQLite table logs every flagged market with
   predicted probability, confidence, timestamp. Tracks resolution
   outcome and computes prediction accuracy/calibration stats.

2. Cross-Platform Fetcher: Pulls comparable markets from Metaculus
   and Kalshi APIs. Passes price discrepancies as context to Claude
   so it can factor in cross-platform mispricing signals.

3. Correlation Detector: Detects when 2+ open positions share the
   same underlying theme (us_iran, bitcoin_price, fed_policy, etc).
   Blocks new trades if theme has 3+ positions or >20% exposure.
   16 theme categories covering geopolitics, crypto, economics.

All three integrated into the scan cycle in engine.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add ticker discovery scanner with dashboard modal

New bot/core/ticker_scanner.py scans ~500 liquid US stocks/ETFs via
Polygon API, filters for volume >2M and price >$15, excludes tickers
already in the bot, and recommends candidates with sector guesses.

Dashboard: "Scan New Tickers" button in Bot Health section opens a
modal showing all candidates in a sortable table with symbol, sector,
price, volume, and daily range %. Includes instructions for how to
add recommended tickers.

API endpoint: /api/ticker-discovery returns JSON report.

Does NOT auto-add tickers — human review required. Prevents untested
tickers with bad spreads from entering the universe.

commit.message:
While loops work: sum(1..10) returns 55

Two-pass branch offset patching: emit code with placeholder branches,
record {offset, target_block, kind} patches, then resolve after all
blocks are laid out. Supports B (unconditional), CBNZ, CBZ.

Milestones:
- M0: return 42 ✅
- M1: add(20,22) with function calls ✅
- M2: if/else with comparisons ✅
- M3: while loop with sum accumulation ✅

fix: 레쉬 활공 전제조건 + _checkPrereqs OR 조건 지원

- prerequisites: '잎 레쉬 유산' → '잎 레쉬' (유산 name_ko와 일치)
- _checkPrereqs: '또는' OR 분기 추가 — 'A 또는 B' → 각각 재귀 체크, 하나만 통과하면 OK
- 행동 카드: summary [1행동] 시작이므로 FEAT_DB scan에서 자동 감지 (desc 연동)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Function calls work: add(20,22) returns 42

Fixed two issues:
1. Mach-O relocations: ARM64_RELOC_BRANCH26 entries for BL instructions,
   undefined external symbol entries for callees. Linker now patches BL
   to correct target address.
2. Function prologue/epilogue: functions with BL calls save/restore
   x29(fp)+x30(lr) via STP/LDP. Without this, BL overwrites LR and
   the caller's RET goes to wrong address (infinite loop).

Self-hosting plan documented in claude/SELF_HOSTING_PLAN.md:
8 milestones from return-42 to self-compile, with comparison debugging
methodology using reference Zig compiler.

Verified: pub fn main() u8 { return add(20, 22); } → exit code 42.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Extract shared date/currency formatters to src/lib/formatters.ts (-278 lines)

Consolidated formatDate, formatDateTime, formatDateShort, formatDateLong,
formatCurrency, formatCurrencyExact, and timeAgo into a single shared
module. Replaced 43 inline duplicates across 30 page files.
